name: MiraeAsset Leverage S&P500 ETN(H)
summary: Mirae Asset Leverage S&P500 ETN (H) is an Exchange Traded Note designed to provide leveraged exposure to the S&P 500 index. As a leveraged product, it aims to amplify the returns of the S&P 500, but also magnifies potential losses; further details on the exact leverage ratio would need further research. The headquarter location would also need further research.
